retry_reason: Release function is invoked only when refcount hits zero; it always succeeds and cannot be retried safely (double-free risk).
contract_summary: This is a kref release callback for batadv_neigh_ifinfo. When the last reference is dropped via kref_put, this function is called to free the object. It releases a reference on the associated if_outgoing interface (if not BATADV_IF_DEFAULT) and then schedules the neigh_ifinfo for RCU-delayed free. After this function completes, the caller must not access the object. This 'put' wrapper completes the object's lifecycle and must only be called through the kref_put mechanism.
